info.title: CSBoard API
info.description: Market data over the CSBoard marketplace — live listings, floats, stickers, minAsk prices, FX rates — plus opt-in buying straight from your balance. Free to read, key-gated, built for automation.

tags.name: Market data
tags.description: Read the live catalog, prices, and FX rates.

tags.name: Trading
tags.description: Buy listings from your CSBoard balance. Opt-in, key-gated.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Your balance, settled funds, and trading status.

get.description: Liveness and price-list freshness probe. No key required — use it to check the API is up and the price list is fresh. This is the only endpoint that works without authentication.
Live buyable listings across the marketplace — each with float, paint seed, stickers, and the asking price in USD. Use keyset pagination via `cursor`.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text match on market hash name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Exact market_hash_name (case-insensitive) — the precise single-item lookup. Unlike fuzzy `search`, it isolates one item even when its name is a word-subset of a longer one (e.g. `Spectrum Case` vs `Spectrum 2 Case`). Takes precedence over `search`.

next_cursor.description: Pass back as `cursor` to fetch the next page. Null on the last page.

get.description: The minAsk price list — one row per market hash name (+ wear + Doppler phase), with the cheapest current ask and how many are listed. Indicative grouped snapshot; can lag the live listing price.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text match on market hash name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Exact market_hash_name (case-insensitive) — the precise single-item lookup. Unlike fuzzy `search`, it isolates one item even when its name is a word-subset of a longer one (e.g. `Spectrum Case` vs `Spectrum 2 Case`). Takes precedence over `search`.

get.description: Full gzipped NDJSON dump of the price list — one price row JSON per line. Use this for full-catalog ingestion (e.g. comparison sites), not pagination. Rate limited to 1 request/minute. Supports ETag / If-None-Match: an unchanged snapshot returns 304 Not Modified.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: Conditional request. Pass the ETag from a previous snapshot to receive 304 if unchanged.

200.description: Gzipped NDJSON stream. Each decompressed line is one PriceRow JSON object. Sets an ETag header.

ETag.description: Opaque snapshot version. Send back as If-None-Match to skip unchanged downloads.

304.description: Not Modified — the snapshot has not changed since the ETag you sent.

get.description: FX rates with USD as the base. Every price in this API is USD — use this to convert to a local currency. Same rate table the site and payment flows use (cached ~1h).
Your purchase history, newest first, with keyset pagination. Filter by time window and status. Pass `meta.next_cursor` back as `cursor` to walk older pages; `next_cursor` is null on the last page.

parameters.name: start_unix_time
parameters.description: Only orders created at or after this Unix timestamp (seconds).

parameters.name: end_unix_time
parameters.description: Only orders created at or before this Unix timestamp (seconds).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Keyset cursor from a previous response's `meta.next_cursor`.

next_cursor.description: Pass back as `cursor` for the next page. Null on the last page.

post.description: Buy 1–10 listings by id, debited from your CSBoard balance. Requires trading enabled on the key + a linked Steam account and trade URL. Buys are charged at the LIVE price at execution; always send `max_price_usd` as an atomic overcharge ceiling. Idempotent via the `Idempotency-Key` header or `idempotency_key` in the body.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional. A retried request with the same key replays the original order instead of buying twice.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g. price moved past your ceiling).

403.description: Trading not enabled on this key.

example.message: Enable buying for this key in your profile.

get.description: Your current balance in USD, plus how much of it is settled (reversal-safe) versus held. Use `settled_balance_usd` to know what is available for reversal-safe spending, and `trading_enabled` to check whether buying is turned on for this key.

Check whether specific listings are still buyable, in one request. Pass up to 100 listing ids as a comma-separated `ids` query parameter. Returns how many of each id are available, plus the ids that are no longer available.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated listing ids. Required. Maximum 100 ids per request.

200.description: Availability map for the requested ids.

available.description: Map of listing id → count currently available.

unavailable_ids.description: Ids that are no longer available.

422.description: Invalid request — `ids` missing or more than 100 ids supplied.

example.detail: Provide between 1 and 100 ids in the ids parameter.

get.description: Look up the status of many orders at once by `custom_ids` and/or `order_ids` (comma-separated). Supply at least one of the two; up to 200 ids in total across both parameters.

parameters.name: custom_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated custom ids you assigned at purchase time.

422.description: Invalid request — no ids supplied, or more than 200 ids in total.

example.detail: Provide custom_ids and/or order_ids, up to 200 ids total.

get.description: Fetch one order by its CSBoard order id, including per-item delivery status.

example.detail: No order found for that id.

post.summary: Buy and deliver to a Steam trade URL
post.description: Buy up to 100 items and deliver them straight to any Steam trade URL you supply (built from `partner` + `token`), paid from your **settled** (reversal-safe) balance. Built for wholesale and automated delivery. Idempotent via the `custom_id` body field — a retry with the same `custom_id` replays the original purchase and the response carries the `Idempotent-Replayed: true` header. This endpoint ships behind a kill-switch and requires a trading-enabled, reversal-clean account.

201.description: Purchase accepted and debited from settled balance.

Idempotent-Replayed.description: Present and `true` when this response replays an earlier purchase made with the same `custom_id`.

unsupported_item.summary: Item cannot be delivered this way

value.detail: One or more items cannot be delivered via this endpoint.
partner and token do not form a valid Steam trade URL.
Settled balance is below the order total.
Balance is below the order total.
Enable buying for this key in your profile.
This endpoint requires a reversal-clean account.
One or more items are no longer available.
A request with this custom_id is still being processed.

500.description: The purchase could not be completed.

example.detail: The purchase could not be completed.

bearerAuth.description: Send your key as a Bearer token on every request: `Authorization: Bearer csb_pub_...`. Generate keys in your CSBoard profile.

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Includes a Retry-After header.

price_list_age_seconds.description: Age of the materialized price list, in seconds (freshness).

wear.description: Sticker wear 0–1, or null if unscraped.

id.description: Stable listing id. Pass to POST /v1/orders.

doppler_phase.description: Doppler / Gamma Doppler phase, e.g. "Phase 2", "Ruby", or null.

price_usd.description: Authoritative asking price in USD. Equals the amount charged if you buy this listing.

tradable_at.description: When the item leaves trade hold. Null if already tradable.

qty.description: How many are listed at or above this group.

item_ids.description: 1–10 unique ids from /v1/listings. Some items can't be combined in a single order — if so the order is rejected and you can split it.

max_price_usd.description: Total ceiling in USD. Strongly recommended — your overcharge protection, enforced atomically inside the locked debit.

idempotency_key.description: Optional; or send the Idempotency-Key header. Replays the original order on retry.

trading_enabled.description: Whether buying is enabled for this key.

settled_balance_usd.description: Portion of the balance that is settled (reversal-safe) and spendable on reversal-safe purchases.

held_usd.description: Portion of the balance currently held.

held_until.description: When the held portion clears, or null if nothing is held.

tradable_at.description: When the item leaves Steam trade hold, or null.

return_reason.description: Why the item was returned, if its status is `returned`.

custom_id.description: Your own id, if you set one at purchase time.

partner.description: Steam trade URL `partner` value. With `token`, forms the destination trade URL.

token.description: Steam trade URL `token` value. With `partner`, forms the destination trade URL.

max_price_usd.description: Total ceiling in USD. Order is rejected with `price_moved` if the live total exceeds it.

custom_id.description: Idempotency key. A retry with the same value replays the original purchase.

skip_unavailable.description: If true, skip items that are no longer available instead of failing the whole request.

Error.description: All errors return { code, detail }. Some carry extra fields (e.g. price_moved adds current_total_usd, insufficient_balance adds required_usd/current_usd).

code.description: Machine-readable error code, e.g. rate_limit_exceeded, trading_not_enabled, price_moved.
